title: CATC 2026 at NITK Surathkal
summary: Cadets of Manipal Jnanasudha from the 6 Kar Naval Unit joined approximately 555 NCC cadets at the NITK Surathkal campus for the official commencement of the 10 day Combined Annual Training Camp (CATC MLORE-11), uniting nine different wings and battalions under the NCC Group Headquarters, Mangaluru. The 10-day camp successfully concluded following intensive training in drills, weapon handling and a specialized cyber safety module by NITK Staff. The collaborative training provided 6 Kar Naval Unit cadets with critical physical fitness and safety skills alongside multiple wings from the Mangaluru Group.

title: Selection of New Batch of Cadets (Class of 2028)
summary: Enrollment for the incoming training cycle successfully concluded with 50 elite cadets selected. The new batch establishes a balanced cohort comprising 26 Senior Division (SD) and 24 Senior Wing (SW) cadets ready to embark on their training path.
